{{Quote|I have better connections in the salt market, but I'll see what I can do.|Shlith-dan|<ref name="GG6-1" />}}
'''Shlith-dan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] with dark gray skin striated with brown streaks. He was addicted to [[Salt/Legends|salt]] and his golden [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] attested to this.

==Biography==
Shlith-dan became addicted to salt at a young age and became a dealer to support his habit. This led him onto further crime. Shlith-dan sought to discover in other [[Species/Legends|species]], a weakness similar to the Arconan addiction to salt to make a profit. He eventually found a [[Fungus/Legends|fungi]] that was addictive to the people of the two [[Shesharile]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. It was the final straw in the collapse of those worlds.

From this episode, Shlith-dan saw the potential profit to be made in virgin territory. He eventually brought [[Invisible Market|black market]] trade to the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. His main rival there was [[Yerkys ne Dago]], but Shlith-dan was not prepared to tangle with such a powerful individual.

==Personality and traits==
Shlith-dan was a calculating individual and although he took enormous risks his business savvy and competence usually saved him from repercussions. He was driven to find a [[Spice/Legends|biological weakness]] in a species native to the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]].
